name: serverkit-minecraft
description: Run a Minecraft server for your friends in a few clicks: Java (Vanilla/Paper/Fabric/Forge) and Bedrock, on the standard itzg community images. Live console (RCON), players, save-aware backups, scheduled restarts with in-game warnings, and a 'Share with friends' card. First vertical of the game-server family.
author: ServerKit
